holdings.infoBox: BBHM is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are Entegris stock at 5.70%, Watsco at 5.04%, Arista Networks at 5.01%, Keysight Technologies at 4.98%, and West Pharmaceutical Services at 4.69%.

overview.description: The BBH Select Mid Cap ETF (BBHM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth through investments in mid-capitalization companies worldwide. Security selection follows a fundamental buy-and-hold strategy. BBHM was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by BBH.
